top_blockers: This branch does not contain a canonical per-sefer Bereishis Hebrew source foundation under data/source_texts/.

Batch 003 review evidence is inconsistent: approved manual packet, unreviewed manifest state.

skipped_or_blocked_items: No reference-source files were present in docs/curriculum_pipeline/reference_sources/, data/curriculum_extraction/reference_sources/, docs/reference_sources/, or data/reference_sources/ on this branch.
No canonical data/source_texts/ foundation was present on this branch, so source-foundation findings were based on current branch evidence rather than a future source-text branch.
